const[teams,setTeams]=useState([]);const[message,setMessage]=useState('');const[showDetails,setShowDetails]=useState(false);const[canRandomize,setCanRandomize]=useState(true);const[isDescriptionCollapsed,setIsDescriptionCollapsed]=useState(true);const[isTableCollapsed,setIsTableCollapsed]=useState(false);const[namesText,setNamesText]=useState("");// Toggle collapse

name=line.replace(/^\d+\.\s*/,'').trim();return{id:uuidv4(),name,rating:3};}).filter(player=>player.name!=='');setPlayers(parsedNames);setNumPlayers(parsedNames.length);setNamesText("");};const ');return`${teamHeader}
